aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO but lacks critical optimizations in content, local SEO, and user engagement.
quick_wins: Add more detailed and keyword-rich content to improve search visibility.
Implement a review generation strategy to build Google Business Profile credibility.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords for better search ranking.

gbp_analysis.found: No active Google Business Profile found based on the provided website.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a Google Business Profile severely impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: No GBP listing to capture local search traffic.
Lack of customer reviews and ratings to build social proof.
Missing crucial business information such as hours, services, and location.

nap_citations.summary: Inconsistent or missing NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web reduce local SEO effectiveness.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
List the business on high-authority local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Regularly audit and update NAP information to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: Product Schema for appliances and HVAC services
Service Schema for HVAC and appliance repair services
Review Schema to highlight customer testimonials

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and structured data to improve search engine understanding of the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC and appliance services in New Braunfels, Texas.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness Schema and adding location-based keywords to website content.
